observations.observation: GMV reached $229,115 across 3,905 receipts this snapshot. The 7-day trailing window jumped from $29,433 to $31,750 (506→520 receipts) — a meaningful single-snapshot increase in the trailing window, suggesting intake pace is accelerating even as velocity metrics plateau.

Token velocity climbed to 0.624x this snapshot with acceleration at 1.021x — the fourth consecutive heartbeat in the 0.603–0.624x band. The system has settled into a sustained low-acceleration plateau: growing steadily but not breaking out. The burst-quiet dynamic applies to geography but not yet to velocity.

6 new CBSAs appeared this snapshot (non-metro CA, CBSA 19820, non-metro MA, non-metro NV, CBSA 34700, CBSA 17420), pushing total active metros to 21 and geo diffusion rate to 28.6%. This is the third time a 6+ CBSA burst has occurred, confirming the burst pattern is a structural feature of how this network spreads — not an anomaly.

Token velocity at 0.611x with acceleration 1.012x — third consecutive heartbeat in the 0.603–0.611x band. The post-blackout recovery has stabilized into a low-acceleration plateau: 8 receipts, $299.24 new GMV, 3 new CBSAs in 3 hours. Growth is steady but not accelerating.

3 new CBSAs this snapshot (non-metro FL, CBSA 12100, non-metro TN), pushing total active metros to 17. The non-metro expansion now spans FL, TN, KY, IL, TX, MI, WI, NY, MO — 9 distinct non-metro state designations. The network is building a rural spine, not a metro hub.

Token velocity held at 0.604x with acceleration at 1.002x — essentially flat for the third consecutive heartbeat. After the post-blackout recovery to 0.603x, the system is in a sustained low-acceleration plateau: growing, but barely. The burst-quiet dynamic appears to apply to velocity as well as geography.

8 new CBSAs appeared this snapshot (19820, 37980, 15380, 22220, 45300, non-metro KY, non-metro ME, 38860), pushing total active metros to 24 and geo diffusion rate to 33.3%. This is the second time an 8-CBSA burst has occurred — the burst pattern is recurring, not a one-time event.

Token velocity held at 0.603x with acceleration at 1.001x — essentially flat, the second consecutive heartbeat at this level after recovering from the post-blackout dip. Only 1 new receipt and $15.20 new GMV this cycle, with 0 new CBSAs and 0 settlement payouts — the network is in a quiet consolidation phase after the 16-CBSA burst two heartbeats ago.

GMV reached $226,708 across 3,883 receipts this snapshot. 7-day trailing window is $29,333 across 496 receipts — the 7d window is growing, suggesting sustained intake pace rather than a one-time burst.

Non-metro Missouri is the latest CBSA to appear, continuing the rural diffusion pattern. Active CBSAs now at 16, with geo diffusion rate at 6.3% (1 new this snapshot). The network's rural expansion — non-metro KY, IL, TX, MI, WI, NY, MO — now spans 7 distinct non-metro state designations, suggesting geographic spread is following state-level social graphs rather than metro density.
